authority_score.description: How authoritative the source is within its tradition and source hierarchy.

relevance_score.description: How directly the source supports the target reasoning task.

clinical_reasoning_value.description: How much the source explains diagnostic, differential, or practitioner reasoning.

pattern_recognition_value.description: How useful the source is for extracting symptom clusters, patterns, syndromes, constitutions, or remedy pictures.

outcome_tracking_value.description: How clearly the source tracks intervention, follow-up, outcomes, and limitations.
